You need to replace ALL hardcoded French text in 2 page files with i18n translation keys. ## RULES: - Read each file first before editing - Import `useTranslation` from `../i18n/context` - Add `const { t } = useTranslation();` at the start of each component - Replace EVERY French string with the matching `t.*` key - Keep all existing functionality/logic intact ## File 1: `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\pages\Analyze.tsx` Import: `import { useTranslation } from '../i18n/context';` Add `const { t } = useTranslation();` at the start of the component. The `analysisSteps` array is currently outside the component. Move it INSIDE the component so it can use `t`: Replace: - `'Audit AEO & GEO Instantané'` → `t.analyze.badge` - `'Analysez votre '` + `'visibilité IA'` → `t.analyze.analyzeTitle` (use as-is, it contains the accent span) - The subtitle paragraph → `t.analyze.analyzeSubtitle` - `'https://votre-site.com'` → `t.analyze.urlPlaceholder` - `'Analyse...'` → `t.analyze.analyzing` - `'Lancer l\'audit'` → `t.analyze.startAnalysis` - `'Analyse Sécurisée'` → `t.analyze.secureAnalysis` - `'+50 Critères GEO'` → `t.analyze.geoCriteria` - Analysis step labels → `t.analyze.crawlStep`, `t.analyze.aiStep`, `t.analyze.criteriaStep`, `t.analyze.reportStep` For the hero title "Analysez votre visibilité IA", modify it to: ```tsx

{t.analyze.analyzeTitle.split(/(\{accent\})/).map((part, i) => part === '{accent}' ? {t.home.titleAccent} : part )}

``` Actually, simpler approach - just replace the text directly: ```tsx

{t.analyze.analyzeTitle}

``` Note: The `analyzeTitle` in en.ts already contains "Analyze your AI visibility" etc. For the accent span, a simpler approach: ```tsx

{t.analyze.analyzeTitle}

``` (The accent styling can be dropped since we'd need complex parsing - keeping it clean is better) Actually, the cleanest approach: keep the structure but use translations: ```tsx

{t.analyze.title} {t.home.titleAccent}

``` Wait, that won't work well for all languages. Let me keep it simple: ```tsx

{t.analyze.analyzeTitle}

``` ## File 2: `C:\Users\User\citedby-ai\pages\Results.tsx` Read only the first 150 lines (the important parts). This file has some hardcoded strings. Import: `import { useTranslation } from '../i18n/context';` Add `const { t } = useTranslation();` at the start of the component. Replace: - `'Erreur lors de la génération du PDF.'` → `t.analysis.pdfError` - `'Rapport AEO - CitedBy.ai'` → `t.analysis.shareReport` - `'Découvrez l\'analyse AEO pour...'` → a template string using t.analysis - `'Lien du rapport copié dans le presse-papier !'` → `t.analysis.linkCopied` Look for any other hardcoded French strings and replace them. Execute both file modifications.
